recommendations.title: Show Me Love
recommendations.overview: Two teenage girls in small-town Sweden. Elin is beautiful, popular, and bored with life. Agnes is friendless, sad, and secretly in love with Elin.

recommendations.title: Lilya 4-ever
recommendations.overview: In a struggling post-Soviet community, Lilya a teenage girl is abandoned when her mother moves to the United States with her boyfriend. Facing neglect and poverty, she meets Andrei, who offers her a job in Sweden, giving her hope for a better life —

recommendations.title: Mammoth
recommendations.overview: When Leo travels to Thailand on business, he unwittingly sets off a chain of events that will have dramatic consequences for everyone.

recommendations.title: Together
recommendations.overview: Elisabeth leaves her abusive and drunken husband Rolf, and goes to live with her brother, Göran. The year is 1975 and Göran lives in a commune called Together. Living in this leftist commune Elisabeth learns that the world can be viewed from differen

recommendations.title: We're So Young
recommendations.overview: The life of Renato Russo, from his first involvement with music, to his years in the punk rock band Aborto Alétrico, to the formation of Legião Urbana, in the Brasília rock scene of 1970s and 1980s.

recommendations.title: Dinner in America
recommendations.overview: An on-the-lam punk rocker and a young woman obsessed with a local band go on an unexpected and epic journey together through the decaying suburbs of the American Midwest.

recommendations.title: Swing Girls
recommendations.overview: A group of delinquent high school girls form a band when they accidentally poison their school's brass band and have to replace them.

recommendations.title: Ana e Vitória
recommendations.overview: Two girls have a chance encounter and instantly befriend. While trying to find themselves, they decide to pursue music together.

recommendations.title: The Decline of Western Civilization
recommendations.overview: The Los Angeles punk music scene circa 1980 is the focus of this film. With Alice Bag Band, Black Flag, Catholic Discipline, Circle Jerks, Fear, Germs, and X.

recommendations.title: Her Smell
recommendations.overview: A self-destructive punk rocker struggles with sobriety while trying to recapture the creative inspiration that led her band to success.
